title: T-075 — UI: CostingScreen (CostingScreen prototype) — 9-step waterfall SVG + scenarios + sliders (NPD-h)
prompt:
# T-075 — Costing screen UI

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.3 + UX prototypes/design/01-NPD-UX.md costing_screen
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx:83-164 (CostingScreen)

## Goal
Client component CostingScreen at /(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]?stage=costing rendering 9-step waterfall SVG/CSS bars (Raw → Retail), 3 scenario cards (target/pessimistic/optimistic), what-if Sliders that recompute and persist as named scenarios.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/page.tsx (RSC) reads costing_breakdowns + waterfall_steps; passes to client.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_components/costing-screen.tsx ('use client') renders Waterfall SVG + Scenarios card + what-if Sliders (shadcn Slider).
3. Margin warn badge when scenario margin <15%; HARD FAIL banner if <0%.
4. RTL parity test against prototype.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_components/costing-screen.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_components/waterfall-bar.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_components/__tests__/costing-screen.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production CostingScreen renders, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/npd/other-stages.jsx:83-164 (CostingScreen), then it has the same 9-step waterfall + 3 scenario cards (target/pessimistic/optimistic) + what-if Sliders using shadcn Slider + Card + Badge primitives — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist
2. Given a scenario margin computes to 10%, when the screen renders, then a yellow 'Margin warn' Badge appears per §17.11.3 V07 rule
3. Given the user adjusts a what-if Slider then clicks Save Scenario, when the action settles, then a new costing_breakdowns row is created with the named scenario per §17.11.3 named-scenario contract

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/costing-screen.test.tsx asserting parity + warn badge + slider+save before component exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test costing-screen'

## Risk red lines
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim
- Do not allow Save when margin < 0% (HARD FAIL banner blocks)
- Do not use HTML <input range> in place of shadcn Slider
